# Third-Party Browser Assets

These files are vendored so revu can run on a LAN without runtime internet access.

## marked 18.0.5

- File: `marked.min.js`
- Source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/marked@18.0.5/lib/marked.umd.min.js
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/marked/v/18.0.5
- License: MIT

## DOMPurify 3.4.11

- File: `purify.min.js`
- Source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/dompurify@3.4.11/dist/purify.min.js
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/dompurify/v/3.4.11
- License: MPL-2.0 OR Apache-2.0

## Mermaid 11.16.0

- File: `mermaid.min.js`
- Source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mermaid@11.16.0/dist/mermaid.min.js
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/mermaid/v/11.16.0
- License: MIT

## svg-pan-zoom 3.6.2

- File: `svg-pan-zoom.min.js`
- Source: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/svg-pan-zoom@3.6.2/dist/svg-pan-zoom.min.js
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/svg-pan-zoom/v/3.6.2
- License: BSD-2-Clause
